description: Failure taxonomy used by SuitCode benchmark reports.

kinds.meaning: The final answer satisfied the schema but differed from deterministic ground truth.
The final answer did not satisfy the required schema.
The run did not satisfy the required tool-use contract.
A required tool was used with incorrect task-defining arguments.
The execution task did not run the required deterministic action.
The execution task ran the wrong deterministic target.
The run hit the configured timeout budget.
The agent CLI failed before a valid task result was produced.
The agent usage quota prevented a valid run.
The expected session artifact could not be resolved.
Multiple candidate session artifacts prevented deterministic attribution.
The harness raised an unexpected exception rather than completing a task evaluation.
